title: Language Change - Consecutive language change
scenario: Consecutive language changes via Device Settings > Language fail after firmware update prompt returns user to Home Screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. From the Home screen, tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
3. In Device Settings, tap on the Language section.
4. Select a new language from the list of available languages.
5. Observe the popup that prompts you to update the software to apply the language change.
6. Follow the on-screen instructions to complete the firmware update.
7. After the firmware update completes, verify that you are returned to the Home screen.
8. Repeat steps 2 through 4: navigate back to Device Settings > Language and select a new language again.
9. Observe the popup prompting a software update again.
10. Complete the firmware update as prompted.
11. Verify that the language change is applied successfully after the second update.
expected: The user can change the language via Device Settings > Language, complete the firmware update, return to the Home screen, and repeat the process a second time successfully with the language change applied each time.
